subject: FW: money matter..
body:
From: BEHNBOM@aol.com [mailto:BEHNBOM@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, March 26, 2008 1:17 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: money matter..

 

Dear Lesley,

 

I paid Frejas ticket from the BBB account at the school..she wants to
come back soon and I also plan to go over there to interview new girls
mid-April...

Thanks to Jeffrey's generosity last year, we employed one girl, Cissi,
half-time, working for the scholarship and BBBs...(Freja works outside
this for my Life Science Summit 2008 this summer)...anyway, with the
dollar almost in half!!in one year we are rapidly using up the money,
even with the latest check, as we are gearing up for our annual big gala
celebrating the new Female Economist 2008 in Stockholm, June 9th.
Another contribution to Stockholm School of Economics, earmarked
Barbro's Fund would enable all this, and I could bring it with me when I
go in 10 days..or, if you want to do it some other way, let me know?!
Also, love to see JE before leaving and catching up!

 

Take care,

 

Barbro <http://cdn-cf.aol.com/se/smi/0201d20638/02> 





________________________________

Create a Home Theater Like the Pros. Watch the video on AOL Home
<http://home.aol.com/diy/home-improvement-eric-stromer?video=15?ncid=aol
hom00030000000001> .
body_html:
From: BEHNBOM@aol.com [mailto:BEHNBOM@aol.com]
Sent: Wednesday, March 26, 2008 1:17 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: money matter..

 

Dear Lesley,

 

I paid Frejas ticket from the BBB account at the school..she wants to come back soon and I also plan to go over there to interview new girls mid-April...

Thanks to Jeffrey's generosity last year, we employed one girl, Cissi, half-time, working for the scholarship and BBBs...(Freja works outside this for my Life Science Summit 2008 this summer)...anyway, with the dollar almost in half!!in one year we are rapidly using up the money, even with the latest check, as we are gearing up for our annual big gala celebrating the new Female Economist 2008 in Stockholm, June 9th. Another contribution to Stockholm School of Economics, earmarked Barbro's Fund would enable all this, and I could bring it with me when I go in 10 days..or, if you want to do it some other way, let me know?! Also, love to see JE before leaving and catching up!

 

Take care,

 

Barbro
